rubric.ideal_profile_summary: Recent grad (2017-2024) with people ops coordinator or office admin/operations experience at a VC-backed or Series A-C startup in SF Bay Area. SFSU or UC school is a strong positive signal. Fintech startup experience (Ironclad, Bluevine, Handshake) is a top green flag. Title combos like 'People Coordinator + Office Ops' or 'Office & Culture Coordinator' are ideal. NOT looking for: pure wellness/hospitality, pure recruiting specialists (Robert Half, staffing firms), senior/VP HR, healthcare-only, candidates outside Bay Area.
positive_signals: EA or office admin at a startup (Series A-D)
People ops coordinator or generalist at a tech company
Covered vendor management, facilities, or office operations
Fintech or Series B SaaS company experience (Ironclad, Bluevine, Handshake-type)
negative_signals: Pure recruiting specialist or talent acquisition only (Robert Half, staffing agencies)
No college degree with unstable work history
Wellness/hospitality/beauty background with no ops transition
Campus/university admin with no startup exposure
rubric.benchmark: Kathy Deng — SFSU, People Operations Coordinator at Ironclad (VC-backed fintech), SF-based. Danielle Bautista — SFSU, People Coordinator & Office Operations at Bluevine (fintech startup), Bay Area.

Kathy Deng.summary: People Ops Coordinator at Ironclad (VC-backed fintech), SFSU, SF-based. Near-perfect match — exact title, right company type, right school, right location. Tagged Anna's HP.

Danielle Bautista.summary: People Coordinator & Office Operations at Bluevine (fintech startup), SFSU, Pacifica CA. Dual title covering both people ops and office ops at a VC-backed fintech — ideal combo.

Fabiha Muhammad.summary: Operations & People Lead at JHS Group Investment, grad 2020, Redwood City CA. Ops + people background, right grad year, Bay Area. In First Round already — strong candidate.

Diana Ramirez.summary: Office & Culture Coordinator at Handshake (major VC-backed startup), tagged Anna's HP. Perfect title and company type — no location/school on file but Handshake experience is a top signal.

Ashley Caballero.summary: Workplace Coordinator at Innovations Personnel Services, SFSU, SF. Tagged Anna's HP. Right title, school, city — staffing agency context slightly softens but overall strong profile.

Wanjiru Gatheru.summary: People Experience Coordinator at Slickdeals (e-commerce), SFSU, Hayward CA. People-focused title, SFSU, Bay Area — misses fintech/startup tier but solid alignment.

Lisa Guan-Casanova.summary: Customer Success Manager at Chefables, SFSU, SF. SFSU and SF are strong positives but CSM title is not people ops or office admin — unclear why moved to First Round without resume context.

Erica Banh.summary: Senior Program Manager, People & Workplace Operations at Cruise (GM), Cornell, Bay Area. Strong pedigree and exact function, but likely too senior and big-company for this role.

Lisa Zhuo.summary: Executive Assistant / Office Manager at 3 Bridge Networks (staffing firm), Merritt College, Oakland. EA/OM title is great, Bay Area location good, but staffing company and community college are mixed signals.

Lusia Mundisugih.summary: Operations Associate at New Energy Nexus (clean energy nonprofit), Hercules CA. Ops background, Bay Area, but nonprofit/energy sector and no school on file.

Bonnie Guan.summary: Administrative Assistant at UC Berkeley rec center, UC Berkeley, SF. UC school and SF are positives; campus job suggests recent grad but lacks startup exposure. Tagged Anna (claude).

Katie Balestreri.summary: Operations Manager (Part-Time) at Madewell (retail), U of Portland, Bay Area. Retail ops part-time role — not startup, not people ops. Limited fit.

Livia Versini.summary: Barista & Hospitality Ambassador, SFSU, SF. Tagged Anna (claude). SFSU and SF are green flags but pure hospitality background with no ops transition visible — weak fit for this role.

Neha Kahlon.summary: Talent Manager at Robert Half (staffing firm), SFSU. Tagged Anna (claude). Pure recruiting at a staffing agency — negative signal per rubric. No location on file.

Malissa Xiong.summary: Lead Wellness Advisor at YogaSix, SF Institute of Esthetics & Cosmetology, SF. Beauty/wellness background entirely — wrong track for people ops + office manager.
